definition.name: coherent_information
definition.definition: The coherent information of a quantum channel Λ is I_c(Λ) = S(ρ_B) - S(ρ_{RB}), where S denotes the von Neumann entropy, ρ_{RB} = (1_R ⊗ Λ)(|φ_+⟩⟨φ_+|^{⊗k} ⊗ |0⟩⟨0|^{⊗(N-k)}), and ρ_B = Tr_R(ρ_{RB}). Here R is a reference system of k qudits maximally entangled with the logical input via Bell pairs |φ_+⟩ = d^{-1/2} Σ_i |i⟩|i⟩. [Ref: Eq.(1) of Sauliere2026, line 134 of main.tex]
